hints.text: Press W, A, S, D to move, R to respawn, SPACE to pause.

Press "P" and hover over a power gnerating/consuming block to view info about the network it is on.
Press "N" while viewing a network to set that as the viewed network. It will keep viewing that network until you press "N" again on a non-power block or a different network.
Some resources like [res://textures/resources/sand.png]Sand are destroyed upon trying to be inputted into the core.

You need to be in command mode to command units.
Press "U" to go into command mode then left-click and drag to select units; then right-click to have the units go where you right-clicked.

actions.text: [res://textures/resources/copper.png](-orange)Copper (-white) is a important resorce on Tarkon. You'll need to mine it.
(-white)You'll need to mine [res://textures/resources/copper.png](-orange)Copper(-white) manually first. Click on copper ore to mine it with your core drone.
(-white)Researh the [res://textures/blocks/power/VentTurbine.png]Vent Turbine and place it on a vent.
(-white)Now resarch and place a [res://textures/blocks/power/CableNode.png]Cable Node to transmit power in the four cardinal directions.

(-white)Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/MechanicalDrill/MechanicalDrillComplete.png](-brown)Mechanical Drill(-white) facing copper ore to automate the mining of copper, then resarch and use the [res://textures/blocks/item transportation/Belt/Belt.png]Belt to transport the copper from the drill to the core.
Now expand your extration operation and get 60 copper.
[res://textures/resources/graphite.png]Graphite is also an important resource. Set up power, drills and conveyors to mine it.
Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/resource extractors/WallCrusher/WallCrusherComplete.png]Wall Crusher to grind sand from the walls.
Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/factories/Silicon Refinery/SiliconRefineryComplete.png]Silicon Refinery. You'll need to provide it with graphite, sand and power.

Research and place 3 [res://textures/blocks/turrets/SingleBarrel/SingleBarrelBase.png]Single Barrel turrets to defend your base from enemies.
You will need to set up power, drills, and conveyors to provide copper ammo for them.


You'll also want to research the [res://textures/blocks/item transportation/BeltRouter.png]Belt Router to split resources on belts in multiple directions.
(-white)Now research and place 8 [res://textures/blocks/walls/LargeCopperWall.png]Large Copper Walls to protect your base from enemies.

Next, you'll need to produce your own units to attack the enemy base.
Research and place a [res://textures/blocks/units/TankFabricator/TankFabricatorComplete.png]Tank Fabricator. You'll need to supply copper, silicon, and power for it to produce units.
(-white)Now command your units and destroy the enemy base. You may need to wait for more units to be produced.
(-white)Now place your own core. Cores can only be placed on core zone tiles.
Congratulations! You've captured your first sector.
